userStories.title: Node.js API Removal
userStories.description: Replace all forbidden Node.js APIs (readFileSync, appendFileSync, existsSync, setTimeout) with Bun-native equivalents (Bun.file().text(), Bun.write, Bun.file().exists(), Bun.sleep) across the codebase as per the v0.19.0 roadmap. Refer to .claude/rules/04-forbidden-patterns.md.
acceptanceCriteria: No occurrences of readFileSync or appendFileSync remain in src/
No occurrences of existsSync remain in src/ (unless performance critical)
No occurrences of setTimeout remain in src/
Codebase passes typecheck and lint after changes
priorErrors: Attempt 1 failed with model tier: fast: Stage requested escalation to higher tier
Attempt 1 failed with model tier: balanced: Stage requested escalation to higher tier

priorFailures.summary: Failed with tier fast, escalating to next tier
Failed with tier balanced, escalating to next tier
